title: Settings
local_runtime_hint: Local Mode also requires the runtime to be started before it can serve chat.
local_runtime_not_ready: Start the local runtime before saving so the backend can pin a port.
api_key_placeholder_openai: sk-... or any token your endpoint expects
local_coming_soon: Embedded local model is shipping in a later milestone.
system_prompt_helper: Override the DM persona and narration instructions.
replicate_key_helper: Required for AI image generation via Replicate cloud.
